owner_intent: Learn how one seasonal context spreads across related life problems, categories, time stages, content formats, and naturally relevant product functions instead of treating a month as a flat keyword list.

july_context_nodes.high_stakes_boundary: Finance and investment branches require current authoritative evidence and must not promise savings or returns.

selection_logic: Do not publish every branch merely because it exists.
Start from the strongest current seasonal or event signal and select only categories with real audience relevance, available evidence, suitable media, and no harmful duplication.
Use one-to-many spread when one context genuinely affects several categories.
Use many-to-one convergence when several contexts jointly explain one problem, such as heat plus humidity plus travel causing a beauty or clothing need.
Use before, during, and after stages when an event has meaningful temporal progression.
Keep slide count, episode count, category count, and product count variable.
Allow information-only output when no product connection is necessary.
content_quality_rules: Replace a generic monthly background with topic-connected evidence, photography, product detail, editorial graphics, screenshots, memes, or an appropriate illustration style.
Turn lists into a useful narrative, comparison, checklist, demonstration, or variable series instead of placing every candidate on one dense card.
Distinguish current facts from seasonal expectations and verify weather, schedules, prices, availability, health claims, and financial claims when used.
Do not force all accounts or categories into the same seasonal event.
Keep the account portfolio separate while allowing one seasonal signal to produce different account-appropriate angles.
commerce_boundary: Match through practical function and life context, not exact keywords alone.
Product matching follows the topic and problem; it does not determine the topic in advance.
Do not force products into runway, pure information, or weakly connected posts.
Price, availability, benefit, review, and affiliate-link facts require approved current data before use.
